{"credits": [], "cve_id": null, "cvss": {"score": 6.7, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:L/AC:H/PR:N/UI:N/S:U/C:N/I:H/A:H"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 6.7, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:L/AC:H/PR:N/UI:N/S:U/C:N/I:H/A:H"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-59", "name": "Improper Link Resolution Before File Access ('Link Following')"}], "description": "### Duplicate Advisory
This advisory has been withdrawn because it is a duplicate of GHSA-7cr3-h577-g38j. This link is maintained to preserve external references.

### Original Description
A vulnerability in the rm utility of uutils coreutils allows a bypass of the --preserve-root protection. The implementation uses a path-string check rather than comparing device and inode numbers to identify the root directory. An attacker or accidental user can bypass this safeguard by using a symbolic link that resolves to the root directory (e.g., /tmp/rootlink -> /), potentially leading to the unintended recursive deletion of the entire root filesystem.", "ghsa_id": "GHSA-v762-x3cf-5mfg", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-04-29T23:13:17Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-v762-x3cf-5mfg", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-v762-x3cf-5mfg"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-04-22T17:16:37Z", "published_at": "2026-04-22T18:31:45Z", "references": ["https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-35349", "https://github.com/uutils/coreutils/pull/9706", "https://github.com/uutils/coreutils/releases/tag/0.7.0", "https://github.com/uutils/coreutils/commit/5e5968cdbc6618acd6c2402a8a98b503f278835e", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-v762-x3cf-5mfg"], "repository_advisory_url": null, "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/uutils/coreutils", "summary": "Duplicate Advisory: uutils coreutils has a Link Following Issue Via rm Utility", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-07-06T20:15:21Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-v762-x3cf-5mfg", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "0.7.0", "package": {"ecosystem": "rust", "name": "coreutils"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 0.7.0"}], "withdrawn_at": "2026-07-06T20:15:20Z"}

title: Duplicate Advisory: uutils coreutils has a Link Following Issue Via rm Utility
